prestazioni: 2GR-FSE 3.5L V6 naturally aspirated engine: Full bolt-on package with HKS Hi-Power 4-2-1 stainless steel headers (part #41034-AK001) paired with a Tomei 3-inch titanium exhaust system (part #EX107S-TI), eliminating the restrictive factory catalytic converters and replacing them with GReddy Revolution RS 100-cell high-flow cats (part #1011001) for optimal scavenging and +28 WHP gain at 7,200 RPM.

Forced induction conversion using a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger (part #771340-0003) with a custom Precision Turbo wastegate (part #PT5565-10) and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup (part #016000-01) to manage the 2GR-FSE’s direct injection system under 12 PSI of boost, targeting 450 WHP on E85 fuel with a Motec M150 ECU (part #M150-0001) for precise fuel and ignition mapping.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (part #LEX04-RT) featuring 30-way adjustable damping, Swift Springs (part #17444-1) with 8K front/7K rear spring rates, and Cusco front strut tower bar (part #606 311 A) to eliminate chassis flex, paired with Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (part #BMR79XZ) for neutral handling balance.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works IS350 widebody kit (part #LB-IS350-F) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, extended 30mm front and 40mm rear, paired with a Varis Arising II front lip (part #VAR-IS350-FL) and a custom 3D-printed rear diffuser from 3D Carbon (part #3D-IS350-RD) for aggressive aero balance.

Custom 19x9.5 +22 front and 19x10.5 +35 rear Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (part #CRK19950F22 & CRK19105R35) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/35/19 front, 285/30/19 rear) with custom wheel spacers from Project Kics (part #PK-IS350-15F & PK-IS350-25R) to fill the fender gaps.

Full interior carbon fiber overhaul with a Seibon carbon fiber hood (part #LEX-IS350-CFHOOD), custom Recaro Sportster CS seats (part #391.91.50) reupholstered in Alcantara with red stitching by Status Racing, and a custom roll cage from Cusco (part #604 311 A) painted in Lexus Ultrasonic Blue Mica 8P4 for structural rigidity and weight reduction.
